programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Chandler's Work Laugh
programme.desc: Monica is put off by the laugh Chandler uses to impress his boss (Sam McMurray); Ross shocks everyone by dating Janice (Maggie Wheeler).

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe meets her estranged father (Bob Balaban) at her grandmother's funeral; Joey's fondness for an expensive bag loses him an audition; Chandler tells perfectionist Monica that she is useless at massage.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Girl Who Hits Joey
programme.desc: Chandler gets nervous when everyone learns about Monica; Joey's new girlfriend gets physical; Ross moves into a new apartment but fails to impress his new neighbors.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe finds a police officer's badge and goes on a spree of arrests until she meets up with the owner; Joey thinks he's in love with Monica; Ross buys a couch but won't pay to have it delivered.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Everybody Finds Out

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Getting fired gives Sheldon the opportunity to explore life beyond physics, but when he spends his time weaving ponchos and acting like a shut-in, Leonard calls Sheldon's mother for assistance.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Dave convinces Calvin to hold a yard sale, but when longtime neighborhood resident Miss Simpson makes a purchase Calvin quickly regrets, he enlists Dave to help him get the valuable object back.

programme.title: The Neighborhood

programme.desc: When Gemma has her car repaired at Calvin's shop, Tina insists she doesn't need to pay for the work, to Calvin's consternation; Malcolm and Marty find themselves on the same dating app and vie for the same woman's attention.

programme.sub-title: As Seen on TV; Can You Spare a Dime
programme.desc: Stardom goes to SpongeBob's head after he appears in Krabs' low-budget commercial; Squidward becomes impoverished.

programme.desc: Julius loses his tooth and has a dream that the PAW Patrol saves a bumbling tooth fairy; when all the paintings mysteriously disappear from the Art Museum Festival, the PAW Patrol must solve the missing art mystery and return all the paintings.

programme.sub-title: Search and Rescue: Pups Save a Snack-Snatcher
programme.desc: When the Adventure Bay potluck food goes missing, the Search and Rescue pups deputize the whole community to track it down.

programme.sub-title: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Save a Giant Chicken; Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Stop Harold's Deep Freeze
programme.desc: The Mighty Twins join the Mighty Pups to save a giant chicken and the town; the Mighty Pups have to stop Harold Humdinger before he puts Adventure Bay in a deep freeze so he can become mayor.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: When Super Kitties Attack

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Mighty Pups Stop a Mighty Eel; Pups Save a Floating Royal Carriage
programme.desc: When an eel accidentally swallows a piece of the meteor and becomes gigantic, it's up to the Mighty Pups to save Adventure Bay; after Sweetie decides to commandeer the Princess's royal carriage and horses, Sid the pirate sends Arrby to steal it.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.sub-title: The Crew Builds a Houseboat; The Crew Builds a Spa

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and his best friend Daisy cheerfully navigate life with boundless enthusiasm and comical misunderstandings due to his instinctive crocodile logic.

programme.sub-title: Rescue Knights: Pups Save a Tournament; Rescue Knights: Pups Save the Baby Dragons

programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Lonesome Walrus; Pups Save the Hummy Gummies

programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown, Bubbletown; Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick work a day on Old Man Jenkins' farm, much to his dismay; Sandy narrates the nocturnal adventures of Gary and his secret pal, Spot.

programme.desc: Patrick wakes up off-model; the Star family works at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: The Nitwitting; The Ballad of Filthy Muck
programme.desc: Patrick inducts SpongeBob into his prestigious society of dullards and doofuses; Patrick takes his grime to a new extreme, playing around in so much trash that he becomes unrecognizable.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward's new life is threatened; stuck in her dome, Sandy suspects Plankton's up to no good and gets Patrick to investigate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Gary is given a set of limbs to keep up with SpongeBob, but soon makes his owner look sluggish; Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself and declaring himself king of SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Jeffy T's Prankwell Emporium; A Taste of Plankton
programme.desc: Squidward's prankster dad visits and brings all sorts of gags with him, much to Squidward's annoyance; Plankton tries to get a taste of the secret formula by attaching himself to SpongeBob's tongue.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Bubble Bass finds himself stranded with Patrick in a mysterious swamp, looking for a lost action figure; SpongeBob learns a new magic trick, but he can't find anyone to watch it.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Chandler argue over authorship of a joke; a question from Monica puts Phoebe on the spot; Joey reluctantly takes a job at Central Perk.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel is worried about her sister's flirtation with Ross; sickly Monica is well enough to seduce Chandler; Joey uses free food to lure women to date him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler's anniversary gift to Monica is really one an ex-girlfriend gave him; Joey hires a look-alike; Ross tries to teach martial arts to Rachel.
